def pieceSquareValue (piece : Piece) (isEndgame : Bool) (sq : Square) : Int :=
  let c := centrality sq
  let adv := Int.ofNat (forwardRank piece.color sq)
  let edgePenalty := if isEdgeSquare sq then 1 else 0
  match piece.kind with
  | .pawn =>
      adv * 6 + c * 2
  | .knight =>
      c * 12 - Int.ofNat edgePenalty * 18 + adv
  | .bishop =>
      c * 6 + adv * 2
  | .rook =>
      c * 2 + adv * 2
  | .queen =>
      c * 3 + adv
  | .king =>
      if isEndgame then
        c * 9 + adv * 2
      else
        kingCastledBonus piece.color sq - c * 7 - adv * 8

% chess-engine.tex -- A chess engine in pure pdfLaTeX (by Claude Code and Mathieu Acher)
% No Lua, no external programs for logic.
% Uses \count registers 200-263 for the 8x8 board.
% Piece encoding: 0=empty, 1=wP, 2=wN, 3=wB, 4=wR, 5=wQ, 6=wK
%                 negatives for black (-1=bP, -2=bN, etc.)

\makeatletter

%% ========================================================
%% Step 1: Board Representation & Coordinates
%% ========================================================

% Square index: (rank-1)*8 + file, where file a=1..h=8, rank 1..8
% So a1=1, b1=2, ..., h1=8, a2=9, ..., h8=64
% Stored in \count registers 200..263 (square index i -> \count\numexpr199+i\relax)

% Set a square value: \setsq{index}{value}
\def\setsq#1#2{\global\count\numexpr199+#1\relax=#2\relax}

% Get a square value (expandable): \getsq{index}
\def\getsq#1{\the\count\numexpr199+#1\relax}

% Precompute file and rank lookup tables for all 64 squares.
% \numexpr division ROUNDS (not truncates), so we use \divide (which truncates).
\count190=1\relax
\loop\ifnum\count190<65
  \count191=\count190\relax \advance\count191 by -1\relax % 0-based index
  \count192=\count191\relax \divide\count192 by 8\relax   % rank 0-based (truncating)
  \count193=\count192\relax \multiply\count193 by 8\relax
  \count194=\count191\relax \advance\count194 by -\count193\relax % file 0-based
  \advance\count192 by 1\relax % rank 1-based
  \advance\count194 by 1\relax % file 1-based
  \expandafter\edef\csname sq@file@\the\count190\endcsname{\the\count194}%
  \expandafter\edef\csname sq@rank@\the\count190\endcsname{\the\count192}%
  \advance\count190 by 1\relax
\repeat

% Precompute mirror table for PST: mirror(sq) = (8-rank)*8+file
% Used for black pieces: look up PST from white's perspective with mirrored square
\count190=1\relax
\loop\ifnum\count190<65
  \count191=\csname sq@file@\the\count190\endcsname\relax  % file 1-8
  \count192=\csname sq@rank@\the\count190\endcsname\relax  % rank 1-8
  % mirror rank: 9-rank
  \count193=\numexpr(9-\count192-1)*8+\count191\relax
  \expandafter\edef\csname sq@mirror@\the\count190\endcsname{\the\count193}%
  \advance\count190 by 1\relax
\repeat

-- eval.sql: Static position evaluation
-- Score from white's perspective (positive = white advantage)
-- Components: material balance + piece-square table bonuses + center control

WITH
pos AS (
    SELECT board, side FROM position LIMIT 1
),

-- Evaluate each square
square_eval AS (
    SELECT
        s.sq,
        s.rank AS r,
        s.file AS f,
        substr(p.board, s.sq + 1, 1) AS piece,
        COALESCE(pv.value, 0) AS mat_value,
        -- PST bonus: for white pieces use sq directly, for black pieces mirror vertically
        COALESCE(
            CASE
                WHEN substr(p.board, s.sq + 1, 1) BETWEEN 'A' AND 'Z' THEN
                    (SELECT bonus FROM pst WHERE pst.piece = UPPER(substr(p.board, s.sq + 1, 1)) AND pst.sq = s.sq)
                WHEN substr(p.board, s.sq + 1, 1) BETWEEN 'a' AND 'z' THEN
                    -(SELECT bonus FROM pst WHERE pst.piece = UPPER(substr(p.board, s.sq + 1, 1)) AND pst.sq = (7 - s.rank) * 8 + s.file)
                ELSE 0
            END, 0
        ) AS pst_bonus
    FROM squares s, pos p
    LEFT JOIN piece_value pv ON pv.piece = substr(p.board, s.sq + 1, 1)
    WHERE substr(p.board, s.sq + 1, 1) != '.'
),

-- Center control bonus: pieces controlling center squares (d4,d5,e4,e5 = sq 27,28,35,36)
center_bonus AS (
    SELECT COALESCE(SUM(
        CASE
            WHEN piece BETWEEN 'A' AND 'Z' AND sq IN (27, 28, 35, 36) THEN 10
            WHEN piece BETWEEN 'a' AND 'z' AND sq IN (27, 28, 35, 36) THEN -10
            WHEN piece BETWEEN 'A' AND 'Z' AND sq IN (18,19,20,21,26,29,34,37,42,43,44,45) THEN 5
            WHEN piece BETWEEN 'a' AND 'z' AND sq IN (18,19,20,21,26,29,34,37,42,43,44,45) THEN -5
            ELSE 0
        END
    ), 0) AS bonus
    FROM square_eval
)

SELECT
    (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(mat_value), 0) FROM square_eval) +
    (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(pst_bonus), 0) FROM square_eval) +
    (SELECT bonus FROM center_bonus)
    AS score;

BOARD-MAKE-MOVE.
           IF B-PLY >= MAX-PLY
               EXIT PARAGRAPH
           END-IF

           ADD 1 TO B-PLY
           MOVE ENCODED-MOVE TO U-MOVE(B-PLY)
           MOVE B-ZOBRIST-KEY TO U-ZOBRIST(B-PLY)
           MOVE B-PAWN-KEY TO U-PAWN-KEY(B-PLY)
           MOVE B-CASTLING-RIGHTS TO U-CASTLING(B-PLY)
           MOVE B-EP-SQUARE TO U-EP-SQUARE(B-PLY)
           MOVE B-HALF-MOVE TO U-HALF-MOVE(B-PLY)
           MOVE B-FULL-MOVE TO U-FULL-MOVE(B-PLY)
           MOVE B-PST-MG TO U-PST-MG(B-PLY)
           MOVE B-PST-EG TO U-PST-EG(B-PLY)
           MOVE B-PHASE TO U-PHASE(B-PLY)

           PERFORM MOVE-DECODE
           MOVE FROM-SQ TO ORIG-FROM-SQ
           MOVE TO-SQ TO ORIG-TO-SQ
           MOVE MOVED TO ORIG-MOVED

           ADD 1 TO B-HALF-MOVE

           IF B-EP-SQUARE NOT = -1
               COMPUTE FILE-I = FUNCTION MOD(B-EP-SQUARE, 8) + 1
               COMPUTE B-ZOBRIST-KEY = B-ZOBRIST-KEY B-XOR Z-EP-KEY(FILE-I)
           END-IF
           MOVE -1 TO B-EP-SQUARE
           COMPUTE B-ZOBRIST-KEY =
               B-ZOBRIST-KEY B-XOR Z-CASTLING-KEY(B-CASTLING-RIGHTS + 1)

           EVALUATE MOVE-TYPE
               WHEN MOVE-CASTLING
                   MOVE ORIG-MOVED TO MOVED
                   MOVE ORIG-FROM-SQ TO FROM-SQ
                   MOVE ORIG-TO-SQ TO TO-SQ
                   PERFORM BOARD-MOVE-PIECE

                   IF B-SIDE-TO-MOVE = WHITE
                       MOVE WR TO MOVED
                   ELSE
                       MOVE BR TO MOVED
                   END-IF

                   IF ORIG-TO-SQ > ORIG-FROM-SQ
                       COMPUTE FROM-SQ = ORIG-TO-SQ + 1
                       COMPUTE TO-SQ = ORIG-TO-SQ - 1
                   ELSE
                       COMPUTE FROM-SQ = ORIG-TO-SQ - 2
                       COMPUTE TO-SQ = ORIG-TO-SQ + 1
                   END-IF
                   PERFORM BOARD-MOVE-PIECE
                   MOVE 0 TO B-HALF-MOVE

               WHEN MOVE-EN-PASSANT
                   IF B-SIDE-TO-MOVE = WHITE
                       COMPUTE TO-SQ = ORIG-TO-SQ - 8
                       MOVE BP TO MOVED
                   ELSE
                       COMPUTE TO-SQ = ORIG-TO-SQ + 8
                       MOVE WP TO MOVED
                   END-IF
                   PERFORM BOARD-REMOVE-PIECE

                   MOVE ORIG-MOVED TO MOVED
                   MOVE ORIG-FROM-SQ TO FROM-SQ
                   MOVE ORIG-TO-SQ TO TO-SQ
                   PERFORM BOARD-MOVE-PIECE
                   MOVE 0 TO B-HALF-MOVE

               WHEN MOVE-PROMOTION
                   IF CAPTURED NOT = MOVE-NO-PIECE
                       MOVE CAPTURED TO MOVED
                       MOVE ORIG-TO-SQ TO TO-SQ
                       PERFORM BOARD-REMOVE-PIECE
                   END-IF

                   MOVE ORIG-MOVED TO MOVED
                   MOVE ORIG-FROM-SQ TO TO-SQ
                   PERFORM BOARD-REMOVE-PIECE

                   IF B-SIDE-TO-MOVE = WHITE
                       COMPUTE MOVED = PROMO + 1
                   ELSE
                       COMPUTE MOVED = 6 + PROMO + 1
                   END-IF
                   MOVE ORIG-TO-SQ TO TO-SQ
                   PERFORM BOARD-PUT-PIECE
                   MOVE 0 TO B-HALF-MOVE

               WHEN OTHER
                   IF CAPTURED NOT = MOVE-NO-PIECE
                       MOVE CAPTURED TO MOVED
                       MOVE ORIG-TO-SQ TO TO-SQ
                       PERFORM BOARD-REMOVE-PIECE
                       MOVE 0 TO B-HALF-MOVE
                   END-IF

                   MOVE ORIG-MOVED TO MOVED
                   MOVE ORIG-FROM-SQ TO FROM-SQ
                   MOVE ORIG-TO-SQ TO TO-SQ
                   PERFORM BOARD-MOVE-PIECE

                   IF FUNCTION MOD(ORIG-MOVED, 6) = 0
                       MOVE 0 TO B-HALF-MOVE
                       IF FUNCTION ABS(ORIG-TO-SQ - ORIG-FROM-SQ) = 16
                           COMPUTE B-EP-SQUARE = (ORIG-FROM-SQ + ORIG-TO-SQ) / 2
                           COMPUTE FILE-I = FUNCTION MOD(B-EP-SQUARE, 8) + 1
                           COMPUTE B-ZOBRIST-KEY =
                               B-ZOBRIST-KEY B-XOR Z-EP-KEY(FILE-I)
                       END-IF
                   END-IF
           END-EVALUATE

           MOVE ORIG-FROM-SQ TO FROM-SQ
           MOVE ORIG-TO-SQ TO TO-SQ
           PERFORM UPDATE-CASTLING-RIGHTS
           COMPUTE B-ZOBRIST-KEY =
               B-ZOBRIST-KEY B-XOR Z-CASTLING-KEY(B-CASTLING-RIGHTS + 1)
